permissions.label: Screen capture
permissions.description: Allow WindieOS to capture the current screen for screenshot context and visual grounding.

permissions.label: Input control
permissions.description: Allow WindieOS to automate mouse, keyboard, and scroll interactions.

permissions.label: Microphone
permissions.description: Allow voice mode and wakeword audio capture.

permissions.label: Workspace file access
permissions.description: Allow file read/replace operations in user-selected workspace locations.

permissions.label: Shell execution
permissions.description: Allow command execution and process management.

permissions.label: Browser automation
permissions.description: Enable browser session automation for navigation and data extraction tasks.

permissions.label: Planned system-access scope
permissions.description: Acknowledges future capability scope for deeper system access when that feature ships.
